channel.title: Meta-Platforms on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Meta-Platforms on Archive 03

item.title: Meta's AI All-In: Is $135 Billion a Waste or a Moat?
item.description: Meta ($META) is facing both skepticism and high expectations from the market regarding its massive AI spending. We analyze whether its investments in advertising efficiency, the Llama ecosystem, AI glasses, and data center CAPEX represent a long-term moat or a waste of capital.
